name: tollerud-noir
description: Tollerud Design System — dark, cinematic, keyboard-first infrastructure UI

button.name: Button
button.description: Primary action button with terminal, ghost, and variant styles

card.name: Card
card.description: Surface container with optional accent border

input.name: Input
input.description: Text input with error state support

code-block.name: CodeBlock
code-block.description: Terminal-style code display with copy action

stat-card.name: StatCard
stat-card.description: Dashboard metric card with label, value, and change indicator

noir-glow-background.name: NoirGlowBackground
noir-glow-background.description: Tollerud.no-inspired animated WebGL background with CSS fallback

action-row.name: ActionRow
action-row.description: Command/action item row with icon, label, description, and shortcut

command-menu.name: CommandMenu
command-menu.description: Raycast-style global command palette with search, groups, and keyboard nav

service-health-card.name: ServiceHealthCard
service-health-card.description: Service status card with uptime, response time, and version

host-card.name: HostCard
host-card.description: Server/VM card with CPU, RAM, disk, containers, and IP

docker-stack-card.name: DockerStackCard
docker-stack-card.description: Docker Compose stack overview with per-service health

approval-card.name: ApprovalCard
approval-card.description: Pending operation approval card with approve/reject actions

action-diff.name: ActionDiff
action-diff.description: Unified diff viewer with line numbers and context toggle

rollback-plan.name: RollbackPlan
rollback-plan.description: Ordered rollback step list with execution status

log-viewer.name: LogViewer
log-viewer.description: Terminal-style scrollable log viewer with search, live follow, and level coloring

alert-inbox.name: AlertInbox
alert-inbox.description: Alert feed with severity badges, filters, and acknowledge action

timeline.name: Timeline
timeline.description: Vertical activity timeline with status dots, connecting lines, and metadata

backup-status-panel.name: BackupStatusPanel
backup-status-panel.description: Backup job overview with per-job status, size, and schedule

textarea.name: Textarea
textarea.description: Multiline text input with label and error state

select.name: Select
select.description: Styled native select dropdown with custom chevron

checkbox.name: Checkbox
checkbox.description: Custom-styled checkbox with checkmark SVG and label

radio-group.name: RadioGroup
radio-group.description: Fieldset-based radio group with custom dot indicator

footer.name: Footer
footer.description: Footer bar with Tollerud monogram and branding link
